info.title: Ocrolus API
info.description:
Ocrolus document automation platform API. Covers Classify (document identification), Capture (data extraction), Detect (fraud detection), and Analyze (financial metrics).

## Authentication
Use OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant to obtain a Bearer JWT token (24h expiry).

## Key Conventions
- v1 endpoints use `book_pk` (integer)
- v2 endpoints use `book_uuid` (UUID string)
- Never mix them -- v1 rejects UUIDs, v2 rejects PKs

## Validation Note
Some endpoint paths have conflicting documentation. Run `validate_endpoints.py` against your tenant to confirm paths before production use.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer JWT token (24h expiry, refresh at 12h)

tags.name: Book Operations
tags.description: Create, read, update, delete Books (v1, book_pk)

tags.name: Document Upload
tags.description: Upload and manage documents within Books

post.description: Body: form-encoded (NOT JSON). OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant. Returns JWT with 24h expiry. No 'audience' param. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/grant-authentication-token
CORRECTED from /v1/book/create. Returns pk (int) and uuid (str). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/create-a-book
Body: JSON. Exactly one of book_id (integer) or book_uuid (UUID string). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/delete-a-book
Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID string) + fields to update. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/update-book

get.description: Query params: page, per_page (both optional). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-list
Query param: book_pk (integer). Alt path: /v1/book/{pk}/status also works. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-status

post.description: Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). Max 200MB. form_type and doc_name optional. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-document

post.summary: book/upload/mixed — Upload a mixed document PDF
post.description: Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). Multiple doc types in single PDF. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-mixed-document

post.summary: book/upload/paystub — Upload a pay stub PDF
post.description: Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-paystub
Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-image
Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/mark-image-group-complete
Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-json
Body: JSON. Production only. Requires auditor_id: 'ocrolus'. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/import-plaid-asset-report

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID). Body (JSON, optional): doc_pk or doc_uuid, accept_charges. Official spec also supports query-param style: /v1/document/cancel?doc_uuid=X | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/cancel-file-verification

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID). Body (JSON): doc_id (integer) or doc_uuid (UUID). Official spec also supports query-param style: /v1/document/remove?doc_uuid=X | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/delete-a-file
Path param: doc_uuid (UUID). Body (JSON): doc_pk or doc_uuid + upgrade_type. Official spec also supports: /v1/document/upgrade?doc_uuid=X | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upgrade-doc
Body (JSON): mixed_doc_pk (integer) or mixed_doc_uuid (UUID) + upgrade_type. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upgrade-mixed-doc

get.description: Query params: exactly one of pk (integer), doc_uuid (UUID), or mixed_doc_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/mixed-document-status
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Identifies 300+ document types with confidence scores (0-1). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-classification-summary
Path param: mixed_doc_uuid (UUID). Organizes forms into logical groups with uniqueness values. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/grouped-mixed-doc-classification-summary

get.summary: book/{pk}/paystubs — Get book pay stub data
document/{doc_uuid}/paystubs — Get document pay stub data

get.description: Path param: form_uuid (UUID). Returns confidence scores per field (0-1). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/form-field-data

Path param: pk (integer). Query params (optional): uploaded_doc_pk, uploaded_doc_uuid, only_tagged, distinct_fields. Alt: /v1/transaction?book_pk=X also works. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/transactions

parameters.name: uploaded_doc_pk
parameters.description: Filter by uploaded document primary key

get.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns authenticity scores (0-100), reason codes, and signal types. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-fraud-signals
Path param: visualization_uuid (UUID). Returns binary image with fraud signal overlays. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/signal-visualization
DEPRECATED. Use /v2/detect/ endpoints instead. Path param: book_uuid (UUID). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/suspicious-activity
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns daily balances, PII, and time series data. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-summary
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Query param: min_days_to_include (integer, optional). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/cash-flow-features

parameters.name: min_days_to_include
parameters.description: Min days for most recent month (default 0, use 32 for full months only)

get.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns transactions with categories and tags. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/enriched-transactions
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns probability of default. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/risk-score
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). NAICS4-based benchmarking. Beta feature.
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns .xlsx binary content. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/analytics-excel
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Query param: guideline (string, optional). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/income-calculations

parameters.name: guideline
parameters.description: Guideline: FANNIE_MAE, FREDDIE_MAC, FHA, VA, USDA

post.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/income-entity-config

put.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/save-income-guideline

post.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Body: JSON. Call BEFORE income-calculations. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/self-employed-income-calculation-fm

get.description: Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Bank Statement Income Calculator results. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/bsic

post.description: Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/create-tag

put.description: Path param: tag_uuid (UUID). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/modify-tag

delete.description: Path param: tag_uuid (UUID). System tags cannot be deleted. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/delete-tag

put.description: Body: JSON. Replaces the full collection. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/update-revenue-deduction-tag
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/override-transaction-tag

post.description: Body: JSON. Max 50 jobs per call. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/create-book-copy-jobs

get.description: Query param: direction (string, optional — 'outbound' or 'inbound'). | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/list-book-copy-jobs

post.description: Path param: job_id (string). Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/copy-jobs-accept

No params. Runs on all AWAITING_RECIPIENT jobs. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/run-kick-outs
Body: JSON. | Docs: https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/add-webhook
